paragraphs.text: CHAPTER 1
THE VISION OF THE ASCENT

SHEKINAIH: I see THE FATHER in a white robe transformed himself into me in Golden Empress robe used a golden key to unlock a dual padlock on a door. As the door was unlocked, it opened up and I saw two ascending paths leading to the top of the same mountain.

The left side of the ascending path was made up of five levels with these words, "Peace and Joy, Meekness of Love, Lowliness of Mind, Yieldedness and Faith in THE ELOHIM" written on each level progressively. I also saw the words "Bridal Path" superimposed on these paths.

The right side of the ascending path was made up of seven levels with these words, "Faith, Joy, Patience, Mercy, Hope, Love and Peace" written on each level progressively. I also saw the words "Anointed Path" superimposed on these paths.

I saw two groups of people ascending these two paths. I saw those who ascend on the Bridal Path have the words, "Brides" written on their foreheads, and those who ascended on the Anointed Path have the words, "Anointed Ones" written on their foreheads.

I saw the Brides and the Anointed Ones ascended their respective path singing the song "Ye are holiness unto the Lord" from our Song Album 1. I saw angels blowing trumpets and sprinkling gold dusts and flowers on them on the left and right of the paths as they progressed from each level. I saw them coated with increasing layers of gold as they progressed from level to level.
After these two groups of people have reached the top of the mountain, I saw them looking at a gate of a garden whose access was through an open field which were paved with broken glasses.
I then saw those whose foreheads are marked with the words, "Brides", crawling on these broken glasses toward the gate.

I saw those whose heads are marked with the words, "Anointed Ones" rolling their bodies over the broken glasses towards the gate. It was a bloody scene as both groups were so cut and bruised by the broken glasses. I then saw them pointing fingers at one another.
After that, I saw all of them fell into a river and the moment their bodies touched the river, the whole river turned into a river of fire.
I saw many angels and demons dragging them out of the fire and nailing them on individual crosses to be crucified.
Shortly, I saw a dark cloud came and absorbed their soul. I saw the word, "Three days", written on the cloud. Then I saw a big whale vomited them out.

I then saw them standing at the Gate of Heaven. I saw the Lord JESUS was already standing at a flowered arch entrance welcoming them, putting garlands of flowers over their necks, and inviting them to His Marriage Supper.
I saw JESUS in me, took a water hose to wash every one of them and put white bridal gown on each of them. He then hugged and danced with them and later sat them down to feast with them.
Finally, I saw these two groups of people kneeled in front of JESUS in me and were crowned with gold crowns on their heads.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you enlighten us regarding the interpretation of these visions SHEKINAIH saw?

JESUS: The Mountain the two groups of people were ascending is Eden, Heavenly Mount Zion; the city of the great king where those who succeed will become My Brides/Anointed Ones and be crowned as kings.

Psa 48:1 A Song and Psalm for the sons of Korah. Great is THE YAHWEH, and greatly to be praised in the city of our ELOHIM, in the mountain of his holiness. Psa 48:2 Beautiful for situation, the joy of the whole earth, is mount Zion, on the sides of the north, the city of the great King. Psa 48:3 THE ELOHIM is known in her palaces for a refuge. Psa 48:4 For, lo, the kings were assembled, they passed by together.

The golden key that opened the dual padlock is the key to the Kingdom of Heaven, the Heavenly Mount Zion, which My Father have given to THE SHE/HE THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR COEXECUTING SABRE, to open to whom
We have called. The path that have five ascending levels are for My Brides and the other path that have seven ascending levels are for My Anointed Ones who are called Christs.
In order to enter into the Gate of My Holy Mountain, My potential Brides must:
Produce the fruits of Peace and Joy through Tribulation
Produce Meekness of Love through Persecution
Produce Lowliness of Mind through Oppression
Walk in Yieldedness
have complete Faith in THE ELOHIM
As for My Anointed Ones to enter into the Gate of My Holy Mountain, they must bear the fruits of:
Faith
Joy
Patience
Mercy
Hope
Love
Peace

All these fruits of righteousness unto holiness are produced by going through the tribulation, persecution, oppression, offences and testing that My FATHER have scripted for their life on earth. This is what I meant "the strait gate and narrow way that leadeth unto life".

The word, "Strait" (G478 stenos) means "narrow". One has to squeeze through the narrow gate that have broken glasses on both sides. The broken glass signifies the tribulations, persecutions and oppressions that My FATHER have put in order for My potential Brides and Anointed Ones to know and experience Our Seven Names.

Matt 7:13 Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to destruction, and many there be which go in thereat": Matt 7:14 Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it

This is signified by the broken glasses the Brides were crawling over or the Anointed Ones were rolling over in the open field at the top of the mountain. Gold represents divinity and flowers signify glory. Every level they have ascended was an attainment of certain state of our divine nature and glory through crucifying their flesh with the affections and lusts. This is signified by the sprinkling of gold dust and flowers by the angels on them.

2 Pet 1:3 According as his divine power hath given unto us all things that pertain unto life and godliness, through the knowledge of him that hath called us to glory and virtue:, 2 Pet 1:4 Whereby are given unto us exceeding great and precious promises: that by these ye might be partakers of the divine nature, having escaped the corruption that is in the world through lust.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why are the Anointed Ones rolling their bodies instead of crawling like the Brides?
JESUS: This is because much is given, much is required. The Anointed Ones have higher calling than My Brides, so We ask more from them.

Lk 12:47 And that servant, which knew his lord's will, and prepared not himself, neither did according to his will, shall be beaten with many stripes" Lk 12:48 But he that knew not, and did commit things worthy of stripes, shall be beaten with few stripes. For unto whomsoever much is given, of him shall be much required: and to whom men have committed much, of him they will ask the more.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why did The Brides and Anointed Ones who point fingers at one another fell into a river burning with fire?

JESUS: "The Pointing of Fingers" signifies murmuring, accusing, or evil speaking against one another because of bitterness and offences due to self- righteousness, which results in judgmental spirit. It is the fastest way to end up being sentenced by the Judge. Each time when one judge others concerning their works, they stray from our protection into the path of the destroyer who walks up and down twenty four hours accusing them day and night before Me.
Jas 5:9 Grudge not one against another, brethren, lest ye be condemned: behold, the judge standeth before the door.
Rev 12:10 ……for the Accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our ELOHIM day and night.
Thus, unless one can guarantee that she/her will not sin with her/his mouth or in doings, it is better to walk in My Law of Liberty in showing mercy by walking in love to cover their transgressions.

Jas 2:10 For whosoever shall keep the whole law, and yet offend in one point, he is guilty of all. Jas 2:11 For he that said, Do not commit adultery, said also, Do not kill. Now if thou commit no adultery, yet if thou kill, thou art become a transgressor of the law. Jas 2:12 So speak ye, and so do, as they that shall be judged by the law of liberty. Jas 2:13 For he shall have judgment without mercy, that hath shewed no mercy; and mercy rejoiceth against judgment.
The river burning with fire signifies Gehenna. One must not judge presumptuously for there is great consequences. It is great transgression in Our eyes.

Psa 19:12 Who can understand his errors? cleanse thou me from secret faults. Psa 19:13 Keep back thy servant also from presumptuous sins; let them not have dominion over me: then shall I be perfect (H8552 "tamam"), and I shall be innocent from the great transgression. Psa 19:14 Let the words of my mouth, and the meditation of my heart, be acceptable in thy sight, O LORD, my strength, and my redeemer.

Have I not admonish that those who are angry and judge their brother who is weak or give it to temptation, shall be in danger of judgment. Condemning your brother as worthless can put one in danger of Gehenna fire.

Mat 5:21 Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not kill; and whosoever shall kill shall be in danger of the judgment: Mat 5:22 But I say unto you, That whosoever is angry with his brother who is weak (G1500 "eike" was probably from G1502 "eiko", apparently a primary verb; properly means "to be weak, to yield or give place) shall be in danger of the judgment: and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca, shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool, shall be in danger of Gehenna fire.

After my potential Brides and the Anointed Ones had been chastised and learned their lessons of not to be self-righteous and not to judge but to be merciful, I will further through angels and demons crucify them on their cross
with fiery trials to destroy the body of sin in the old man in them. Once this is accomplished, I will by the decree of My FATHER through SHEKINAIH through your hand resurrect them.

Rom 6:5 For if we have been planted together in the likeness of his death, we shall be also in the likeness of his resurrection: Rom 6:6 Knowing this, that our old man is crucified with him, that the body of sin might be destroyed, that henceforth we should not serve sin. Rom 6:7 For he that is dead is freed from sin.
The big whale that vomited them out of her belly signifies you and the belly signifies Hell/Sheol).

Jon 2:1 Then Jonah prayed unto THE YAHWEH his ELOHIM out of the fish's belly, Jon 2:2 And said, I cried by reason of mine affliction unto THE YAHWEH, and he heard me; out of the belly of hell (H7585 Sheol).
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH all the visions I gave you through others showing you as a whale?
